title: Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
short_info: Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) has published the Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) Notification 2026 on 22 April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 10 Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 35 years (as on 01 January 2026, with relaxation for reserved categories) and holding a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised University along with required computer and Mizo language proficiency are eligible to apply online at Mizoram PSC Official Website. The application process will be active up to 05 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the not

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates or as notified by Government. Age limit as on 01 January 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree from a recognised University, Computer Proficiency as per Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment Rules 2023, Mizo Language Proficiency (exempted if studied Mizo in HSLC or above)
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree from a recognised University. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency as prescribed by the Government (exemption if studied Mizo in HSLC or above).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
